description.p: While you cannot heal, you can stop injuries from getting worse.

sheet.description: While you cannot heal, you can stop injuries from getting worse.

description.p: Starting at 1st level, you can use your technique to stop injuries from getting worse. As a bonus action for 1 CE, you can make a symbol with your hand and touch a creature within 5 feet. If a creature is taking damage over time, you cause that damage to stop and the creature gains temporary hit points equal to your CE modifier + your level for 1 hour. This does not stop new effects from affecting the target. You also gain proficiency in Medicine.

sheet.description: For 1 CE, touch a creature within 5 feet. If it is taking damage over time, that damage stops and the creature gains {{pain:killer:temp:hp}} temporary hit points for {{pain:killer:length}} hour. This does not stop new effects from affecting the target.

description.p: At 3rd level, you can use Pain Killer on all willing creatures within 5 feet as a free action on your turn, spending 1 CE for each creature. This increases to 10 feet at 6th level and 15 feet at 11th level.

sheet.description: You can use Pain Killer on all willing creatures within {{pain:killer:practiced:hands:range}} feet as a free action on your turn, spending 1 CE for each creature.

description.p: At 6th level, when you use Pain Killer on a creature, they also lose one condition of your choice and if they are making death saves they are immediately stabilized. You now gain Expertise in Medicine.

sheet.description: When you use Pain Killer on a creature, they lose one condition of your choice and if they are making death saves they are immediately stabilized.

description.p: At 11th level, when a creature that you can see within 10 feet would take damage, as a reaction for 4 CE you can halve the damage.

sheet.description: When a creature that you can see within 10 feet would take damage, for 4 CE you can halve the damage.

description.p: Finally at 18th level you have learned to expand your domain. At initiative 20, you and all creatures of your choice fall under the effects of Pain Killer. You can use Analgesic as a free action for no cursed energy without a reaction, but only once per damage instance.

sheet.description: At initiative 20, you and all creatures of your choice fall under the effects of Pain Killer. You can use Analgesic as a free action for no cursed energy without a reaction, but only once per damage instance.
